title: 姉ちゃんにまかしとき！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Tamamo Cross invites me to an
okonomiyaki party. We're on the way back to the
dorm with groceries when...

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Waaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Taiyaki Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Hey, c'mon now, li'l fella, I can just make ya
another next time you're here. 'Kay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, mister! What happened?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh... that taiyaki on the ground... It hurts real
bad, droppin' good food like that, don't it?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... My taiyaki...

text_block_list.name: Taiyaki Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to whip him up a fresh one, but I'm all
outta batter...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Then how 'bout I make him one! Mind if I borrow
your tools?

text_block_list.name: Taiyaki Stall Owner
text_block_list.text: I don't mind, but again, I'm out of stock...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, I got ya covered.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When ya don't got it, make it! That's my fam's
golden rule!

text_block_list.name: Taiyaki Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Well I'll be. Who woulda thought you could use
okonomiyaki batter to make taiyaki. You've got a
sharp mind there, missy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just a little life hack I picked up! Oop, I think it's
about time to flip the mold over!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: On it—hup!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! Nice job keepin' 'em golden brown! Ya
got a real steady hand on ya!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you think so?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, these guys are ready to go! Dig in!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
How's it treatin' ya? The taste 'n texture are
probably a li'l different, but it's still taiyaki, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The pastry and the red bean paste are both
super yummy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I hope ya learned somethin' today, kiddo. Even if
things are lookin' down, all ya gotta do is think
outside the box!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If there's somethin' ya want, don't give up till ya
got it! Cryin' your eyes out won't help!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll remember that! Thanks, Miss!
choice_data_list:
We can always count on the big sister to save
the day!

We can always count on the big sister to save
the day!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll remember that! Thanks, Miss!
choice_data_list:
We can always count on the big sister to save
the day!

We can always count on the big sister to save
the day!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You know it—especially when it comes to
kids!

text_block_list.name: Taiyaki Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for savin' my tush there, missy. You may
be small, but you sure know your stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What's me bein' short got to do with it?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Dang it! One day, I'll be a freakin' giant of an
Umamusume, and I'll tower over da whole lot of
ya! Just you wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's heartfelt declaration echoes all
around.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! This is good 'n all, but I need to get
some proper okonomiyaki in me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's still plenty left over for our okonomiyaki
party, so let's hurry back 'n chow down!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer 'n I'll swing by again for taiyaki some time,
so you guys take care!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we head back to the academy and have
ourselves some delicious okonomiyaki.
